compiled_state.title: test_skill_md_scenario_analysis tests fail until Scenario Analysis step added to brainstorm SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Deferred from review of dso-d63r/dcfe-8be7/563f-9df3 batch. The test_skill_md_scenario_analysis section in tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh will fail until SKILL.md gains a 'Scenario Analysis' heading, complexity threshold numbers, and conditional directives. These tests are protected behind the [test_red_team_prompt_structure] RED marker. No action needed until the scenario analysis epic story is implemented.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
